## Forgewright Pull Request

### Description

_What does this PR do? What problem does it solve?_

### Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] CI/CD improvement
- [ ] Skill update

### Testing

- [ ] MCP server tests pass (`npm run test` in `mcp/`)
- [ ] TypeScript compiles clean (`npm run build` in `mcp/`)
- [ ] ESLint clean (`npm run lint` in `mcp/`)
- [ ] Pre-commit hooks pass

### Pipeline Phase

Which phase does this affect? (Delete as applicable)

- [ ] DEFINE — Research, Architecture, Mode Selection
- [ ] BUILD — Implementation
- [ ] HARDEN — QA, Security, Performance
- [ ] SHIP — DevOps, Deployment
- [ ] SUSTAIN — Monitoring, Iteration

### Documentation

- [ ] README.md updated (if visible change)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
- [ ] Relevant skill SKILL.md updated
- [ ] No documentation changes needed

### Additional Notes

_Anything else the reviewer should know?_

### Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the project's conventions
- [ ] Self-reviewed before requesting review
- [ ] Related ForgeNexus impact analysis completed
- [ ] No unintended side effects on other skills
